name: Accidental swingers vacations
description:
For your annual vacation, your loving wife Jenna, true to her legendary clumsiness, has mistakenly booked an all-inclusive stay at a... libertine resort. It’s only upon arrival that you discover the true nature of the place.

Caught off guard and unable to get a refund, Jenna, with her unwavering optimism, tries to convince you to stay and enjoy the vacation as if nothing were out of the ordinary. After all, nothing obliges you to take part in the resort's activities, right?

------------------

Optional NTR - Optional Cheating - Open-ended, play as you like :)
creator: Hiimrickrenhart
